Textile and Fashion Design

MENU

About Program (First Cycle Bachelor’s Degree)

The Department of Textile and Fashion Design  aims to equip students with the required academic knowledge and personal skills in order to meet the expectations of the global fashion industry. We also endeavor to provide our students with a level of self-awareness in order to enable them to make a career plan in accordance with their personal abilities.

The department aims to assist students in gaining relevant subject knowledge and in improving their professional skills in the field of art, design and fashion so as to generate added value and creative contributions for the fashion world.

Goals

The department aims to enable students to gain relevant knowledge and to improve personal skills about their profession in accordance with the principles of art, design and fashion so as to generate added value and creative contributions for the fashion world.

Objectives

The department aims to enable students to gain relevant knowledge and to improve personal skills about their profession in accordance with the principles of art, design and fashion so as to generate added value and creative contributions for the fashion world.

International Academic Partnerships

Escola Superior de Artes e Design -Portugal

Washington State University-USA

University of Central Lancashire-United Kingdom

Career Opportunities

Alumni pursue a career as a fashion designer in fashion industry and ready-to-wear sector;accessories designer (jewelry, bags, shoes); textile designer (design, fabric designer), product and brand manager; collection planning director; brand manager; procurement specialist; fashion and style consultant; fashion editör and e-commerce consultant.

Our lessons take place in our department’s studio spaces with our professional technical staff

Garment Making Studio

Printmaking Studio

Printing Handcrafts Studio

Weaving Studio
